untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of specific chart patterns (consolidation base count, failed breakouts, prior support/resistance zones, and base range midpoints) that cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators. These pattern-based conditions require multi-bar pattern recognition, historical swing analysis, and relative positioning within consolidation structures—capabilities not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated core mechanical conditions: 10-day MA breakdown (sma_10 < close reversal), close below opening (failed breakout signal), and elevated volume (vol_ratio_20). Untranslatable pattern elements: (1) 'general market topping signs' requires broad market context; (2) '3rd or 4th consolidation base' requires pattern counting; (3) 'breaks above upper band by >1.5%' requires identifying dynamic base bands; (4) 'volume on breakdown >125%' would need vol_ratio_20 > 1.25 but signal specifies this applies only to breakdown bars within pattern; (5) 'breaks toward middle 50% of prior base' requires historical range calculation. Exit condition 'falls below 80-day average for 2 consecutive bars' requires bar-count logic beyond single-bar operators.
